title: This Silicon Valley city is quietly becoming Robot Row. Here's who's clanking around.
excerpt: A growing number of robotics companies now have a footprint in Fremont, which sits at the intersection of Silicon Valley talent and manufacturing.
content_html:
On a Thursday afternoon, about 70 people gathered around a nearly six-foot-tall humanoid robot outside an unassuming office building.

Employees, executives, and board members of Agility Robotics, along with local officials, had come to christen the humanoid startup's new engineering hub: a 60,000-square-foot facility where nearly 200 existing and new employees will work on the AI and skills for its Digit bipedal robot.

The ribbon-cutting didn't take place in San Francisco, Palo Alto, or San Jose, where some leading robotics companies have decided to cluster. Agility chose Fremont — an East Bay city better known for its industrial parks than for Silicon Valley startup mythology — to plant its new center.

Agility is the latest robotics startup to have a foothold in the area. Over the past 15 years, Fremont has seen companies tied to robotics or autonomous vehicles set up shop in the city.

Tesla, Meta, Zoox, Pony.ai, and DoorDash are among the big-name players that have established a footprint in Fremont to support their robotics ambitions.

At Agility's new facility, engineers will teach Digit new tasks and improve the skills it already has.

"This is going to be the robot school," Jonathan Hurst, Agility's cofounder and chief robot officer, told Business Insider. "This is where we teach robot skills. It's really going to be centered here."

The hardware side of Silicon Valley

Fremont's rise as a robotics center builds on an industrial history that Mayor Raj Salwan said the city deliberately preserved.

For more than 25 years, the city was home to New United Motor Manufacturing, or NUMMI, a joint venture between General Motors and Toyota. When the plant shut down in 2010, other cities might have converted the site into office space or housing.

Salwan said the city chose another direction.

"We doubled down on industrial," the mayor told Business Insider. "We preserved our industrial land, and we said we're all in on manufacturing."

Tesla acquired the NUMMI plant that year, preserving Fremont's automotive ties and attracting a network of suppliers. Meanwhile, the city courted other industries, such as semiconductor, biotech, and advanced manufacturing companies, Salwan said.

Now, the manufacturing base is supporting Fremont's latest transition.

Robotics companies need some of the same things that have attracted earlier hardware businesses to the East Bay city, namely large buildings, production expertise, and enough open floor space for machines to move around.

The city tried to make it easier to open such large facilities. Salwan said Fremont streamlined regulations, developed in-house expertise, and changed some zoning rules to allow qualifying projects to move forward without lengthy hearings.

"We tell you everything up front, and then we help fast-track the process," Salwan said. "If you want to build things, Fremont is the place."

The lab meets the factory floor

Large floor space is only half the equation for robotics companies. They also need talent.

Fremont doesn't exactly sit in the heart of the research and venture capital ecosystem found near Stanford University and Sand Hill Road. But it's close enough to tap into the same pool of engineers, investors, and business partners.

The city is roughly 15 miles east of Palo Alto, across the Dumbarton Bridge. The proximity keeps companies like DoorDash and Zoox close to the talent, their headquarters, and their manufacturing hubs throughout the Bay Area.

DoorDash, which is headquartered in San Francisco, designs and builds its delivery bot, Dot, in Fremont through a partnership with Sonic Manufacturing. The partnership allows engineers from DoorDash Labs, the company's robotics arm, to work "shoulder-to-shoulder" with Sonic employees, a DoorDash spokesperson said.

"In some situations, going from designing the line to rolling out our first robot could take months or even years," the spokesperson said. "Thanks to the collaboration between the team working at Sonic and our Labs facilities, it only took a matter of weeks."

Anyware Robotics, a small startup founded in 2023 that builds mobile warehouse robots, fits its entire operation inside one 11,000 square-foot Fremont facility.

Torsten Schreiber, Anyware cofounder and VP of go-to-market and product, said everything from software development to robot testing happens in the same building, allowing the startup to iterate quickly.

"Fremont sits at the intersection of Silicon Valley software talent and the East Bay's hardware and manufacturing," he said. "It's a combination that is hard to find anywhere else."

Schreiber said the location also puts his company near its customers' warehouses and distribution operations.

Zoox, Amazon's robotaxi venture, also planted its manufacturing operations in Fremont and the neighboring city of Hayward. Its Fremont site retrofits test vehicles and configures sensor pods, while the Hayward facility assembles the purpose-built robotaxi.

Zoox said the locations are close enough to its headquarters in Foster City to allow daily collaboration between the engineering and manufacturing teams. A Zoox spokesperson said the company is hiring for several positions supporting the two sites.

Physical AI needs physical space

In 2022, Meta expanded operations not far from its Menlo Park headquarters with a Fremont campus. Today, that campus is heavily focused on hardware research and development, particularly robotics and virtual- and augmented-reality devices, a Meta spokesperson said.

Across the street is Agility's new hub.

Fremont is not about to replace San Francisco or the Peninsula as the Bay Area's startup and venture capital centers. Instead, the city's role has proven to be more physical, enabling companies to expand their robotics ambitions and place engineers near the factory floor.

Tesla earlier this year said its first large-scale Optimus humanoid production line would replace the Model S and Model X lines at its Fremont plant.

Agility, meanwhile, will continue to manufacture its Digit humanoid in Salem, where the startup is headquartered, while expanding its engineering pool in the Bay Area, Hurst, the cofounder, said.

In Fremont, Digit will undergo extensive testing as engineers teach the humanoid new skills.

As the robotics race heats up, investors are hungry to see robots work beyond a demo video. Hurst said that Agility's new Fremont presence will also give customers and investors already passing through the Bay Area a chance to see Digit in action.

"It's no longer acceptable to show just a demo or a video of a robot doing a thing," Hurst said, adding that the Fremont location saves visitors from making a trip to Agility's Salem HQ.

"Having this here so people can swing through is really convenient."

Read next

Lloyd Lee

blocks.html_en: "Fremont sits at the intersection of Silicon Valley software talent and the East Bay's hardware and manufacturing," he said. "It's a combination that is hard to find anywhere else."

sentences.en: "Fremont sits at the intersection of Silicon Valley software talent and the East Bay's hardware and manufacturing," he said.
sentences.zh: “弗里蒙特位于硅谷软件人才与东湾硬件和制造业的交汇处，”他说。

sentences.en: "It's a combination that is hard to find anywhere else."
sentences.zh: “这是在其他地方很难找到的组合。”

blocks.html_en: Schreiber said the location also puts his company near its customers' warehouses and distribution operations.

sentences.en: Schreiber said the location also puts his company near its customers' warehouses and distribution operations.
sentences.zh: 施赖伯表示，该地点还使他的公司靠近客户的仓库和分销业务。

blocks.html_en: Zoox, Amazon's robotaxi venture, also planted its manufacturing operations in Fremont and the neighboring city of Hayward. Its Fremont site retrofits test vehicles and configures sensor pods, while the Hayward facility assembles the purpose-built robotaxi.

sentences.en: Zoox, Amazon's robotaxi venture, also planted its manufacturing operations in Fremont and the neighboring city of Hayward.
sentences.zh: 亚马逊的机器人出租车企业 Zoox 也在弗里蒙特和邻近城市海沃德设立了制造工厂。

sentences.en: Its Fremont site retrofits test vehicles and configures sensor pods, while the Hayward facility assembles the purpose-built robotaxi.
sentences.zh: 其弗里蒙特工厂改造测试车辆并配置传感器吊舱，而海沃德工厂组装专用机器人出租车。

sentences.en: Zoox retrofits its robotaxi testing fleet in Fremont.
sentences.zh: Zoox 改造了位于弗里蒙特的机器人出租车测试车队。

sentences.en: Carlos Barria/Reuters
sentences.zh: 卡洛斯·巴里亚/路透社

blocks.html_en: Zoox said the locations are close enough to its headquarters in Foster City to allow daily collaboration between the engineering and manufacturing teams. A Zoox spokesperson said the company is hiring for several positions supporting the two sites.

sentences.en: Zoox said the locations are close enough to its headquarters in Foster City to allow daily collaboration between the engineering and manufacturing teams.
sentences.zh: Zoox 表示，这些地点距离其位于福斯特城的总部足够近，以便工程和制造团队之间进行日常协作。

sentences.en: A Zoox spokesperson said the company is hiring for several positions supporting the two sites.
sentences.zh: Zoox 发言人表示，该公司正在招聘多个支持这两个网站的职位。

blocks.html_en: Physical AI needs physical space

sentences.en: Physical AI needs physical space
sentences.zh: 物理人工智能需要物理空间

blocks.html_en: In 2022, Meta expanded operations not far from its Menlo Park headquarters with a Fremont campus. Today, that campus is heavily focused on hardware research and development, particularly robotics and virtual- and augmented-reality devices, a Meta spokesperson said.

sentences.en: In 2022, Meta expanded operations not far from its Menlo Park headquarters with a Fremont campus.
sentences.zh: 2022 年，Meta 在距离门洛帕克总部不远的弗里蒙特园区扩大了业务范围。

sentences.en: Today, that campus is heavily focused on hardware research and development, particularly robotics and virtual- and augmented-reality devices, a Meta spokesperson said.
sentences.zh: Meta 发言人表示，如今，该园区主要专注于硬件研发，特别是机器人技术以及虚拟现实和增强现实设备。

blocks.html_en: Across the street is Agility's new hub.

sentences.en: Across the street is Agility's new hub.
sentences.zh: 街对面是 Agility 的新中心。

blocks.html_en: Fremont is not about to replace San Francisco or the Peninsula as the Bay Area's startup and venture capital centers. Instead, the city's role has proven to be more physical, enabling companies to expand their robotics ambitions and place engineers near the factory floor.

sentences.en: Fremont is not about to replace San Francisco or the Peninsula as the Bay Area's startup and venture capital centers.
sentences.zh: 弗里蒙特不会取代旧金山或半岛成为湾区的创业和风险投资中心。

sentences.en: Instead, the city's role has proven to be more physical, enabling companies to expand their robotics ambitions and place engineers near the factory floor.
sentences.zh: 相反，事实证明，这座城市的作用更加实体化，使公司能够扩大其机器人技术的雄心，并将工程师安置在工厂车间附近。

blocks.html_en: Tesla earlier this year said its first large-scale Optimus humanoid production line would replace the Model S and Model X lines at its Fremont plant.

sentences.en: Tesla earlier this year said its first large-scale Optimus humanoid production line would replace the Model S and Model X lines at its Fremont plant.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉今年早些时候表示，其第一条大型擎天柱人形生产线将取代弗里蒙特工厂的 Model S 和 Model X 生产线。

blocks.html_en: Agility, meanwhile, will continue to manufacture its Digit humanoid in Salem, where the startup is headquartered, while expanding its engineering pool in the Bay Area, Hurst, the cofounder, said.

sentences.en: Agility, meanwhile, will continue to manufacture its Digit humanoid in Salem, where the startup is headquartered, while expanding its engineering pool in the Bay Area, Hurst, the cofounder, said.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，联合创始人赫斯特表示，Agility 将继续在初创公司总部所在地塞勒姆生产数字人形机器人，同时扩大其在湾区的工程人才库。

sentences.en: Agility Robotics' Fremont center will also host investors and customers passing through Silicon Valley.
sentences.zh: Agility Robotics 的弗里蒙特中心还将接待途经硅谷的投资者和客户。

sentences.en: Agility Robotics
sentences.zh: 敏捷机器人

blocks.html_en: In Fremont, Digit will undergo extensive testing as engineers teach the humanoid new skills.

sentences.en: In Fremont, Digit will undergo extensive testing as engineers teach the humanoid new skills.
sentences.zh: 在弗里蒙特，当工程师教授人形机器人新技能时，Digit 将接受广泛的测试。

blocks.html_en: As the robotics race heats up, investors are hungry to see robots work beyond a demo video. Hurst said that Agility's new Fremont presence will also give customers and investors already passing through the Bay Area a chance to see Digit in action.

sentences.en: As the robotics race heats up, investors are hungry to see robots work beyond a demo video.
sentences.zh: 随着机器人竞赛的升温，投资者渴望看到机器人在演示视频之外发挥作用。

sentences.en: Hurst said that Agility's new Fremont presence will also give customers and investors already passing through the Bay Area a chance to see Digit in action.
sentences.zh: Hurst 表示，Agility 在弗里蒙特的新办事处也将使已经经过湾区的客户和投资者有机会看到 Digit 的实际运作。

blocks.html_en: "It's no longer acceptable to show just a demo or a video of a robot doing a thing," Hurst said, adding that the Fremont location saves visitors from making a trip to Agility's Salem HQ.

sentences.en: "It's no longer acceptable to show just a demo or a video of a robot doing a thing," Hurst said, adding that the Fremont location saves visitors from making a trip to Agility's Salem HQ.
sentences.zh: 赫斯特说：“仅仅展示机器人做某事的演示或视频已经不再被接受。”他补充说，弗里蒙特的地点让游客无需前往 Agility 的塞勒姆总部。

blocks.html_en: "Having this here so people can swing through is really convenient."

sentences.en: "Having this here so people can swing through is really convenient."
sentences.zh: “这里有这个，这样人们就可以穿梭过去，真的很方便。”

sentences.zh: 阅读下一篇

blocks.html_en: • Robotics

sentences.en: Robotics
sentences.zh: 机器人技术

content_html_zh:
周四下午，大约 70 人聚集在一栋不起眼的办公楼外，围绕着一个近六英尺高的人形机器人。

Agility Robotics 的员工、高管和董事会成员以及当地官员为这家人形初创公司的新工程中心命名：一个占地 60,000 平方英尺的设施，近 200 名现有和新员工将在这里研究其 Digit 双足机器人的人工智能和技能。

剪彩仪式并未在旧金山、帕洛阿尔托或圣何塞举行，一些领先的机器人公司已决定在这些地方聚集。 Agility 选择弗里蒙特（东湾城市）来建立其新中心，弗里蒙特以其工业园区而非硅谷创业神话而闻名。

Agility 是最新一家在该领域立足的机器人初创公司。 过去 15 年里，与机器人或自动驾驶汽车相关的公司在弗里蒙特开设了分店。

Tesla、Meta、Zoox、Pony.ai 和 DoorDash 等知名企业已在弗里蒙特立足，以支持他们的机器人野心。

在 Agility 的新工厂，工程师将教授 Digit 新任务并提高其已有的技能。

Agility 联合创始人兼首席机器人官乔纳森·赫斯特 (Jonathan Hurst) 告诉《商业内幕》：“这将成为机器人学校。” “这是我们教授机器人技能的地方。 它真的会集中在这里。”

硅谷的硬件方面

弗里蒙特市作为机器人中心的崛起建立在其市长 Raj Salwan 表示该市刻意保存的工业历史之上。

25 年来，这座城市一直是新联合汽车制造公司 (NUMMI) 的所在地，该公司是通用汽车公司和丰田汽车公司的合资企业。 当该工厂于 2010 年关闭时，其他城市可能已将其改造成办公空间或住房。

萨尔万说，这座城市选择了另一个方向。

“我们在工业上加倍努力，”市长告诉《商业内幕》。 “我们保留了我们的工业用地，我们说我们将全力投入制造业。”

特斯拉当年收购了 NUMMI 工厂，保留了弗里蒙特的汽车联系并吸引了供应商网络。 萨尔万表示，与此同时，该市还吸引了半导体、生物技术和先进制造公司等其他行业的青睐。

现在，该制造基地正在支持弗里蒙特的最新转型。

机器人公司需要一些与早期硬件企业吸引到东湾城市相同的东西，即大型建筑、生产专业知识和足够的开放空间供机器移动。

该市试图让此类大型设施的开放变得更加容易。 萨尔万表示，弗里蒙特简化了法规，发展了内部专业知识，并更改了一些分区规则，以允许符合条件的项目无需漫长的听证会即可推进。

萨尔万说：“我们预先告诉您一切，然后我们帮助加快流程。” “如果你想建造东西，弗里蒙特就是你的地方。”

实验室与工厂车间相结合

对于机器人公司来说，大面积的占地面积只是方程式的一半。 他们还需要人才。

弗里蒙特并不完全位于斯坦福大学和沙山路附近的研究和风险投资生态系统的中心。 但它足够接近，可以利用同一批工程师、投资者和商业伙伴。

该市位于帕洛阿尔托以东约 15 英里处，横跨敦巴顿大桥。 邻近的地理位置使 DoorDash 和 Zoox 等公司靠近整个湾区的人才、总部和制造中心。

DoorDash 总部位于旧金山，通过与 Sonic Manufacturing 合作在弗里蒙特设计和构建其送货机器人 Dot。 DoorDash 发言人表示，此次合作使该公司机器人部门 DoorDash Labs 的工程师能够与 Sonic 员工“并肩”工作。

“在某些情况下，从设计生产线到推出我们的第一个机器人可能需要数月甚至数年的时间，”发言人说。 “由于 Sonic 团队和我们实验室设施之间的合作，只花了几周的时间。”

Anyware Robotics 是一家成立于 2023 年的小型初创公司，致力于制造移动仓库机器人，其整个运营业务都集中在弗里蒙特一处 11,000 平方英尺的工厂内。

Anyware 联合创始人兼市场和产品副总裁托斯顿·施赖伯 (Torsten Schreiber) 表示，从软件开发到机器人测试的所有工作都在同一栋大楼内进行，从而使初创公司能够快速迭代。

“弗里蒙特位于硅谷软件人才与东湾硬件和制造业的交汇处，”他说。 “这是在其他地方很难找到的组合。”

施赖伯表示，该地点还使他的公司靠近客户的仓库和分销业务。

亚马逊的机器人出租车企业 Zoox 也在弗里蒙特和邻近城市海沃德设立了制造工厂。 其弗里蒙特工厂改造测试车辆并配置传感器吊舱，而海沃德工厂组装专用机器人出租车。

Zoox 表示，这些地点距离其位于福斯特城的总部足够近，以便工程和制造团队之间进行日常协作。 Zoox 发言人表示，该公司正在招聘多个支持这两个网站的职位。

物理人工智能需要物理空间

2022 年，Meta 在距离门洛帕克总部不远的弗里蒙特园区扩大了业务范围。 Meta 发言人表示，如今，该园区主要专注于硬件研发，特别是机器人技术以及虚拟现实和增强现实设备。

街对面是 Agility 的新中心。

弗里蒙特不会取代旧金山或半岛成为湾区的创业和风险投资中心。 相反，事实证明，这座城市的作用更加实体化，使公司能够扩大其机器人技术的雄心，并将工程师安置在工厂车间附近。

特斯拉今年早些时候表示，其第一条大型擎天柱人形生产线将取代弗里蒙特工厂的 Model S 和 Model X 生产线。

与此同时，联合创始人赫斯特表示，Agility 将继续在初创公司总部所在地塞勒姆生产数字人形机器人，同时扩大其在湾区的工程人才库。

在弗里蒙特，当工程师教授人形机器人新技能时，Digit 将接受广泛的测试。

随着机器人竞赛的升温，投资者渴望看到机器人在演示视频之外发挥作用。 Hurst 表示，Agility 在弗里蒙特的新办事处也将使已经经过湾区的客户和投资者有机会看到 Digit 的实际运作。

赫斯特说：“仅仅展示机器人做某事的演示或视频已经不再被接受。”他补充说，弗里蒙特的地点让游客无需前往 Agility 的塞勒姆总部。

“这里有这个，这样人们就可以穿梭过去，真的很方便。”
